The identifier you supply here applies to the entire claim.\"}]]\n"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"20b:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":[\"Required when an authorization number is assigned by the payer or UMO \",[\"$\",\"em\",\"em-0\",{\"children\":\"and\"}],\" the services on this claim were preauthorized. This authorization number applies to the payer you listed in the \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-0\",{\"children\":\"receiver\"}],\" object. If you need to include authorization numbers for other payers, you can include them in \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-1\",{\"children\":\"claimInformation.otherSubscriberInformation.otherPayerName.otherPayerPriorAuthorizationNumber\"}],\".\"]}],\"\\n\",[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-1\",{\"children\":\"Generally, preauthorization numbers are assigned by the payer or UMO to authorize a service prior to its being performed. The UMO (Utilization Management Organization) is generally the entity empowered to make a decision regarding the outcome of a health services review or the owner of information.\"}]]\n"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"20c:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":[\"Required when a referral number is assigned by the payer or Utilization Management Organization (UMO) \",[\"$\",\"em\",\"em-0\",{\"children\":\"and\"}],\" a referral is involved.\"]}]]\n20d:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":[\"Required when you plan to submit an \",[\"$\",\"$L3ec\",\"a-0\",{\"href\":\"https://www.stedi.com/docs/healthcare/submit-claim-attachments\",\"children\":\"attachment\"}],\" for the claim electronically through Stedi APIs or SFTP, when there is a paper attachment following this claim, or when the provider deems it necessary to identify additional information that is being held at the provider's office and is available upon request.\"]}],\"\\n\",[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-1\",{\"children\":[\"Use this object when there is a single attachment for the claim. If there are multiple attachments, use the \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-0\",{\"children\":\"reportInformations\"}],\" array instead.\"]}]]\n20e:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":\"A control number assigned to the attachment. The payer uses this identifier to match the attachment to the claim.\"}],\"\\n\",[\"$\",\"ul\",\"ul-0\",{\"children\":[\"\\n\",[\"$\",\"li\",\"li-0\",{\"children\":[\"You must include either this property or \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-0\",{\"children\":\"attachmentId\"}],\" in the request, but not both. Including both properties will result in an error.\"]}],\"\\n\",[\"$\",\"li\",\"li-1\",{\"children\":\"We recommend using a ULID or UUID of up to 50 characters.\"}],\"\\n\",[\"$\",\"li\",\"li-2\",{\"children\":\"Stedi autogenerates a control number if you don't provide one.\"}],\"\\n\"]}]]\n215:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":[\"Code indicating the reason for the delay in claim submission. Visit \",[\"$\",\"$L3ec\",\"a-0\",{\"href\":\"https://www.stedi.com/docs/healthcare/claims-code-lists#delay-reason-codes\",\"children\":\"Claims code lists\"}],\" for a complete list.\"]}]]\n216:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":[\"Please use the \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-0\",{\"children\":\"fileInformationList\"}],\" array instead.\"]}]]\n217:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":\"An array of additional information items the payer requested. Not commonly used.\"}]]\n"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"218:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":\"Details about the patient's healthcare diagnosis. Only required when the diagnosis may have an impact on the adjudication of the claim in cases where specific dental procedures may minimize the risks associated with the connection between the patient's oral and systemic health conditions.\"}],\"\\n\",[\"$\",\"ul\",\"ul-0\",{\"children\":[\"\\n\",[\"$\",\"li\",\"li-0\",{\"children\":[\"Use \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-0\",{\"children\":\"ABK\"}],\" as the type for the principal diagnosis code and \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-1\",{\"children\":\"ABF\"}],\" for any other diagnosis codes you include.\"]}],\"\\n\",[\"$\",\"li\",\"li-1\",{\"children\":[\"Use one \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-0\",{\"children\":\"ABK\"}],\" code as the first object, and then you can submit up to 3 \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-1\",{\"children\":\"ABF\"}],\" codes as needed. If you need to submit more codes than this, you must create additional, separate claims.\"]}],\"\\n\"]}]]\n"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"219:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":\"The diagnosis code.\"}],\"\\n\",[\"$\",\"ul\",\"ul-0\",{\"children\":[\"\\n\",[\"$\",\"li\",\"li-0\",{\"children\":\"You must submit a valid, billable code at the highest level of specificity. Include the 4th - 7th characters as applicable.\"}],\"\\n\",[\"$\",\"li\",\"li-1\",{\"children\":[[\"$\",\"strong\",\"strong-0\",{\"children\":\"Don't\"}],\" submit the decimal point for ICD codes. The decimal point is implied.\"]}],\"\\n\",[\"$\",\"li\",\"li-2\",{\"children\":[[\"$\",\"strong\",\"strong-0\",{\"children\":\"Don't\"}],\" submit ICD-10 header codes. Header codes exist to group related codes and aren't valid for billing. These header codes can change with each new version of ICD-10, so we recommend reviewing your diagnosis codes every year to ensure that they aren't classified as header codes in the most recent version. To determine whether a code is a header code, you can also search the \",[\"$\",\"$L3ec\",\"a-0\",{\"href\":\"https://vsac.nlm.nih.gov/context/cs\",\"children\":\"Value Set Authority Center\"}],\". If the 'Header' property is set, the code is a header code and you shouldn't use it in claim submissions.\"]}],\"\\n\"]}]]\n"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"21a:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":[\"Code indicating the specific industry code list. Can be set to \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-0\",{\"children\":\"ABK\"}],\" - International Classification of Diseases Clinical Modification (ICD-10-CM) Principal Diagnosis or \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-1\",{\"children\":\"ABF\"}],\" - International Classification of Diseases Clinical Modification (ICD-10-CM) Diagnosis, \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-2\",{\"children\":\"TQ\"}],\" Systemized Nomenclature of Dentistry (SNODENT).\"]}]]\n21b:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":[\"Information about orthodontic treatment. Required when the claim contains services related to treatment for orthodontic purposes. You \",[\"$\",\"strong\",\"strong-0\",{\"children\":\"must\"}],\" include one of these properties in this object: \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-0\",{\"children\":\"monthsCount\"}],\", \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-1\",{\"children\":\"monthsRemaining\"}],\", or \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-2\",{\"children\":\"treatmentIndicator\"}],\".\"]}]]\n21c:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":\"The estimated number of treatment months, expressed as a decimal.\"}]]\n21d:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":\"The number of months remaining in the treatment, expressed as a decimal.\"}]]\n21e:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":[\"The only allowed value is \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-0\",{\"children\":\"Y\"}],\", which indicates that services reported in this claim are for orthodontic purposes. Only include this property if you haven't set the \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-1\",{\"children\":\"monthsCount\"}],\" or \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-2\",{\"children\":\"monthsRemaining\"}],\" properties.\"]}]]\n21f:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":\"Required when other payers are known to potentially be involved in paying on this claim. This object contains information about other health plans under which the patient has coverage. It's used for coordination of benefits scenarios.\"}]]\n220:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":[\"Code indicating whether or not the insured has authorized the plan to remit payment directly to the provider. Can be set to \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-0\",{\"children\":\"N\"}],\" - No (Payment should go to the patient), \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-1\",{\"children\":"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"\"Y\"}],\" - Yes (Payment should go directly to the provider), or \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-2\",{\"children\":\"W\"}],\" - Not Applicable.\"]}]]\n221:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":[\"A code identifying the type of claim. For example \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-0\",{\"children\":\"DS\"}],\" - Disability. Use \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-1\",{\"children\":\"OF\"}],\" when submitting Medicare Part D claims. Use \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-2\",{\"children\":\"ZZ\"}],\" when you don't know the type of insurance. Visit \",[\"$\",\"$L3ec\",\"a-0\",{\"href\":\"https://www.stedi.com/docs/healthcare/claims-code-lists#claim-filing-indicator-codes\",\"children\":\"Claims code lists\"}],\" for a complete list.\"]}]]\n222:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":\"Use this object to report prior payers' claim level adjustments that cause the amount paid to differ from the amount originally charged. Codes and associated amounts must come from either paper remittance advice or 835s (Electronic Remittance Advice) received on the claim. When the information originates from a paper remittance advice that does not use the standard Claim Adjustment Reason Codes, you must convert them to standard Claim Adjustment Reason Codes.\"}]]\n223:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":\"The adjustment reason codes and amounts. You can include up to six objects in this array to describe a single adjustment group code.\"}]]\n224:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":[\"The dollar amount of the adjustment, expressed as a decimal. For example, \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-0\",{\"children\":\"100.50\"}],\".\"]}]]\n23a:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":[\"The total amount in dollars the patient or their representatives have paid on this claim. For example, \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-0\",{\"children\":\"20.50\"}],\". This includes any co-payments, co-insurance, or other amounts already collected from the patient.\"]}],\"\\n\",[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-1\",{\"children\":[\"If the patient has not paid anything, you should omit this property entirely - \",[\"$\",\"strong\",\"strong-0\",{\"children\":\"don't\"}],\" set it to \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-0\",{\"children\":\"0\"}],\".\"]}]]\n"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"23b:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":[\"An identifier you assign to the claim. We \",[\"$\",\"strong\",\"strong-0\",{\"children\":\"strongly recommend\"}],\" submitting a unique value for this property so you can use it to correlate this claim with responses, such as the 277CA claim acknowledgment and the 835 ERA.\"]}],\"\\n\",[\"$\",\"ul\",\"ul-0\",{\"children\":[\"\\n\",[\"$\",\"li\",\"li-0\",{\"children\":[\"Use random strings. The identifier should be more complex than a simple sequential number and should be hard to guess. Formats with patient initials or the date of service in them can create duplicates. We recommend using \",[\"$\",\"$L3ec\",\"a-0\",{\"href\":\"https://www.npmjs.com/package/nanoid\",\"children\":\"nanoid\"}],\" or a similar library to generate unique IDs.\"]}],\"\\n\",[\"$\",\"li\",\"li-1\",{\"children\":\"Keep it to 17 characters max. Some payers cut off values longer than 17 characters in 277CAs and ERAs, which makes it hard to match them with the original claim.\"}],\"\\n\",[\"$\",\"li\",\"li-2\",{\"children\":\"Use alphanumeric characters only. Avoid special characters, as many payers don't handle them properly.\"}],\"\\n\"]}]]\n"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"23c:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":[\"Code identifying the type of facility where the services were or may be performed. Visit \",[\"$\",\"$L3ec\",\"a-0\",{\"href\":\"https://www.cms.gov/medicare/coding-billing/place-of-service-codes/code-sets\",\"children\":\"Place of Service Codes\"}],\" for a complete list.\"]}]]\n"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"23d:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":[\"The code indicating whether the provider accepts assignment in their relationship with the payer. Can be set to \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-0\",{\"children\":\"A\"}],\" - Assigned or \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-1\",{\"children\":\"C\"}],\" - Not Assigned. Code \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-2\",{\"children\":\"A\"}],\" is required when either the provider accepts assignment or has a participation agreement with the payer OR when the provider doesn't accept assignment or have a participation agreement but is advising the payer to adjudicate this specific claim under participating provider benefits allowed in certain plans.\"]}],\"\\n\",[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-1\",{\"children\":[\"Note that this is \",[\"$\",\"strong\",\"strong-0\",{\"children\":\"not\"}],\" where you should indicate whether the patient has assigned benefits to the provider - you must indicate that in the \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-0\",{\"children\":\"benefitsAssignmentCertificationIndicator\"}],\" property.\"]}]]\n"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"23e:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":\"Required when the entire claim is being submitted as a predetermination of benefits. Predetermination of benefits claims are submitted in advance of services to get an estimate of what the patient's health plan will pay.\"}],\"\\n\",[\"$\",\"ul\",\"ul-0\",{\"children\":[\"\\n\",[\"$\",\"li\",\"li-0\",{\"children\":[\"Can be set to \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-0\",{\"children\":\"true\"}],\" to indicate predetermination of dental benefits.\"]}],\"\\n\",[\"$\",\"li\",\"li-1\",{\"children\":\"Not all dental payers support predetermination of benefits claims.\"}],\"\\n\",[\"$\",\"li\",\"li-2\",{\"children\":[\"Some payers prohibit setting \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-0\",{\"children\":\"claimInformation.claimDateInformation.serviceDate\"}],\" for predetermination of benefits claims. Refer to your payer's specific guidelines for more information.\"]}],\"\\n\"]}]]\n"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"23f:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":\"The agency claim number for this transaction. Used when services included in this claim are part of a property and casualty claim.\"}]]\n240:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":[\"Code identifying an accompanying cause of an illness, injury or an accident. Can be set to \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-0\",{\"children\":\"AA\"}],\" - Auto Accident, \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-1\",{\"children\":\"EM\"}],\" - Employment, or \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-2\",{\"children\":\"OA\"}],\" - Other Accident. You can include up to two codes in this array.\"]}]]\n241:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":[\"Indicates whether the provider has on file a signed statement by the patient authorizing the release of medical data to other organizations. Can be set to \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-0\",{\"children\":\"Y\"}],\" - Yes, or \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-1\",{\"children\":\"I\"}],\" - Informed Consent to Release Medical Information for Conditions or Diagnoses Regulated by Federal Statues. Use \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-2\",{\"children\":\"I\"}],\" when the provider has not collected a signature AND state or federal laws do not require a signature be collected.\"]}]]\n"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"242:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":\"Required when the location for the service is different from the billing provider's address. The purpose of this object is to identify specifically where the service was rendered. This can be healthcare facilities, such as surgical centers or reference labs, OR the patient's address when services were rendered in their home.\"}],\"\\n\",[\"$\",\"ul\",\"ul-0\",{\"children\":[\"\\n\",[\"$\",\"li\",\"li-0\",{\"children\":[\"Only include this object when the service facility location is \",[\"$\",\"strong\",\"strong-0\",{\"children\":\"different\"}],\" from the billing provider's address. If you include this object when the address is the same, Stedi omits all of the service facility location information from the claim submission, including the name and any identifiers.\"]}],\"\\n\",[\"$\",\"li\",\"li-1\",{\"children\":\"For telehealth services, the service facility location is the provider's address, even though the patient may have been in their home or elsewhere when receiving services.\"}],\"\\n\",[\"$\",\"li\",\"li-2\",{\"children\":\"Sometimes the billing provider is an actual physician group that is located at the same address as a hospital, but is in fact a separate entity. In this case, you can differentiate the service facility location by including the specific suite or building number of the physician group. This ensures that the service facility location is different from the billing provider's address and is reported accurately.\"}],\"\\n\"]}]]\n"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"243:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":\"The address of where services were rendered.\"}],\"\\n\",[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-1\",{\"children\":\"If the service facility location is in an area where there are no street addresses, enter a description of where the service was rendered. For example, 'crossroad of State Road 34 and 45'.\"}],\"\\n\",[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-2\",{\"children\":[\"For United States addresses, you \",[\"$\",\"strong\",\"strong-0\",{\"children\":\"must\"}],\" include the full nine-digit zip code with no separators, such as \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-0\",{\"children\":\"100031502\"}],\". If you don't know the full zip code, you can find it using the \",[\"$\",\"$L3ec\",\"a-0\",{\"href\":\"https://tools.usps.com/zip-code-lookup.htm\",\"children\":\"USPS ZIP Code Lookup\"}],\" tool.\"]}]]\n"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"244:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":\"The first line of the street address. This typically contains the building number and street name.\"}]]\n245:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":\"The second line of the street address. This typically contains the apartment or suite number.\"}]]\n246:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":\"The city name.\"}]]\n247:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":\"Use the alpha-2 country codes from Part 1 of ISO 3166.\"}]]\n248:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":\"Use the country subdivision codes from Part 2 of ISO 3166.\"}]]\n249:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":\"The postal zone or zip code. Exclude punctuation and spaces.\"}]]\n24a:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":\"The state or province code. Only required when the city is in the Unites States and Canada.\"}]]\n24b:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":[\"The organization \",[\"$\",\"$L3ec\",\"a-0\",{\"href\":\"https://www.stedi.com/docs/healthcare/national-provider-identifier\",\"children\":\"National Provider Identifier (NPI)\"}],\" assigned to the service facility. Only include this property when the service facility is not a component or subpart of the \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-0\",{\"children\":\"billing\"}],\" provider. Don't include when the service facility is the patient's home.\"]}]]\n251:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":\"Information about one or more services rendered to the patient.\\n- Each service line must be a unique service event as defined by the payer's billing policies. This means that you can use the same procedure code on multiple service lines as long as they are distinct events.\\n- Some procedure codes are date-specific. In these cases, you may need to create a separate service line with that code for each applicable date of service, even if the episode of care extended over multiple days.\\n- Service lines can share the same dates of service if the patient received multiple services on the same day.\"}]]\n252:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":\"Information about the assistant surgeon who rendered the care. Use this object when the rendering providers provided these services in the role of the assistant surgeon.\"}],\"\\n\",[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"1\",{\"children\":[\"This should be an individual, not an organization, and you should supply at least the surgeon's \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-0\",{\"children\":\"lastName\"}],\" and an identifier, which is typically the \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-1\",{\"children\":\"npi\"}],\".\"]}]]\n253:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":\"The provider's commercial number.\"}]]\n254:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":\"The provider's first name.\"}]]\n255:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":\"The provider's last name.\"}]]\n256:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":\"The provider's location number.\"}]]\n257:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":\"The provider's middle name or initial.\"}]]\n258:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":\"The individual National Provider Identifier (NPI) assigned to the provider.\"}]]\n259:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":\"The provider's business name.\"}]]\n25a:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":\"Deprecated; do not use.\"}]]\n26d:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":[\"Indicates whether the provider's signature is on file. Can be set to \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-0\",{\"children\":\"N\"}],\" - No or \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-1\",{\"children\":\"Y\"}],\" - Yes.\"]}]]\n"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"26e:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":[\"Code indicating the Special Program under which the services rendered to the patient were performed. Used for Medicaid claims only. Can be set to \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-0\",{\"children\":\"01\"}],\" - Early \u0026 Periodic Screening, Diagnosis and Treatment (EPSDT) or Child Assessment Program (CHAP), \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-1\",{\"children\":\"02\"}],\" - Physically Handicapped Children's Program, \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-2\",{\"children\":\"03\"}],\" - Special Federal Funding, or \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-3\",{\"children\":\"05\"}],\" - Disability. Codes \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-4\",{\"children\":\"02\"}],\", \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-5\",{\"children\":\"03\"}],\", and \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-6\",{\"children\":\"05\"}],\" are used for Medicaid claims only.\"]}]]\n"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"26f:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":\"The status of the teeth involved in the service. Required when the submitter is reporting a missing tooth or a tooth to be extracted in the future. You can include up to 35 objects in this array.\"}]]\n270:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":\"The tooth number according to the American Dental Association tooth designation system.\"}]]\n271:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":[\"Can be set to \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-0\",{\"children\":\"E\"}],\" - To Be Extracted, \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-1\",{\"children\":\"M\"}],\" - Missing.\"]}]]\n15c:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":[\"The patient's last name. \",[\"$\",\"strong\",\"strong-0\",{\"children\":\"Don't\"}],\" include the patient's name suffix, such as Jr. or III. Use the designated \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-0\",{\"children\":\"suffix\"}],\" property instead.\"]}]]\n272:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":\"The patient's identification number. Only used in Property and Casualty claims.\"}]]\n273:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":\"The patient's middle name or initial.\"}]]\n274:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":[\"Identifies the relationship of the patient to the subscriber. Can be set to \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-0\",{\"children\":\"01\"}],\" - Spouse, \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-1\",{\"children\":\"19\"}],\" - Child, \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-2\",{\"children\":\"20\"}],\" - Employee, \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-3\",{\"children\":\"21\"}],\" - Unknown, \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-4\",{\"children\":\"39\"}],\" - Organ Donor, \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-5\",{\"children\":\"40\"}],\" - Cadaver Donor, \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-6\",{\"children\":\"53\"}],\" - Life Partner, or \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-7\",{\"children\":\"G8\"}],\" - Other Relationship.\"]}]]\n275:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":\"The patient's Social Security Number. Only used for Property and Casualty claims.\"}]]\n276:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":[\"The patient's name suffix, such as Jr. or III. Only include the patient's personal name suffix - \",[\"$\",\"strong\",\"strong-0\",{\"children\":\"don't\"}],\" include professional or academic titles, such as M.D. or MBA.\"]}]]\n1a9:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":\"The subscriber's health plan group number.\"}],\"\\n\",[\"$\",\"ul\",\"ul-0\",{\"children\":[\"\\n\",[\"$\","])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"\"li\",\"li-0\",{\"children\":[\"Provide this property OR the \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-0\",{\"children\":\"policyNumber\"}],\", not both.\"]}],\"\\n\",[\"$\",\"li\",\"li-1\",{\"children\":[\"Provide this property OR the \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-0\",{\"children\":\"subscriberGroupName\"}],\", not both. If this property is set, Stedi ignores the \",[\"$\",\"code\",\"code-1\",{\"children\":\"subscriberGroupName\"}],\" property.\"]}],\"\\n\"]}]]\n277:[[\"$\",\"p\",\"p-0\",{\"children\":[\"Identifies the type of insurance policy within a specific insurance program.
